creator: cmt@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 192971
update vagrant to 2.0.4

Attached patch updates vagreant to 2.0.4. This passes "poudriere testport" and "works for me".
Please note new dependencies rubygem-win32-file and rubygem-win32-file-security; I've taken the liberty to create these ports (and their dependencies) in advance in ports r468764 .
